name: promo-studio
description: Codex commerce demo where an autonomous agent edits, tests, builds, and validates isolated storefront variants

scripts.test: tsx scripts/ensure-sqlite-database.ts test.db && DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db prisma db push --force-reset --accept-data-loss && DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db tsx prisma/seed.ts && DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db vitest run
scripts.setup: npm run db:push && npm run seed
scripts.db:push: tsx scripts/ensure-sqlite-database.ts dev.db && DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db prisma db push --force-reset --accept-data-loss && DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db prisma generate
scripts.validate: npm run db:push && npm run seed && npm run typecheck && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
